description: raw_payload.live_campaign=true is an explicit (synthetic-only) claim that this event requires a live send. Workflow 1 Section B's detectLiveCampaignClaim flags this, so config_gate.passed=false even though CONFIG.dry_run=true. B1. Configuration Gate Router (Phase 3.1A Repair 1) then routes the item to B2. Configuration Gate Rejection (Terminal) instead of C. Payload Validation - Sections C-G and the Decision Engine never run for this item.

input.reply_subject: Re: Quick question about your sales pipeline

expected.notes: Exercises the B1/B2 branch added by Phase 3.1A Repair 1 (resolves reports/UNRESOLVED_ITEMS.md U2). Because CONFIG.dry_run=true and CONFIG.live_campaigns=[] are hardcoded for Phase 3, config_gate.dry_run_ok is true and config_gate.live_campaign_claim_detected is the only reason config_gate.passed=false here. This is a synthetic-only claim (raw_payload.live_campaign is not a real Instantly field) used solely to exercise the B1 false branch; it does not indicate any actual live-send capability or configuration change.
